title: Facilitator Guide — Day 7 — Field Research & Market Exchange
prepChecklist: Confirm squads completed Day 6 prep (assumptions, 5 questions, field plan)
Brief mentors on Discover mode encoding in SPIKE Studio
Prepare Market Intelligence Exchange slide deck
Target: 3 interviews per member (9 per squad) — minimum 3 encoded to unlock exchange

sessionFlow.activity: Deck — What Did The Market Tell You?
sessionFlow.notes: Frame Tuesday: AM field research, PM market exchange.
SPIKE Studio Discover mode. Capture alias, occupation, 5 Q answers, reflection. AI extracts goals, pain points, themes.
7 min per squad. Each answers: What surprised you? Which assumption changed? What quote stayed with you? What will you investigate next?
SPIKE Studio auto-generates reflection prompt. Participants return to field with sharper hypotheses.

debriefQuestions: Which squad showed the strongest interview evidence?
What patterns are emerging across Cassiopeia, Pegasus, and Argo Navis?
Are squads on track for 9 encoded interviews before Thursday FEC Lab?
commonPitfalls: Encoding without completing minimum 3 answer fields
Skipping Market Intelligence Exchange before reflection
coachingTips: One interview is a story — nine interviews are evidence
Celebrate customer quotes, not advisor opinions
Point squads back to SPIKE Studio — no duplicate forms
